description_long: This object is a rectangular, vertical filing cabinet constructed from wood with a rich, medium-brown grain pattern. The cabinet features a simple, monolithic design with no visible handles, label holders, or decorative elements, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The wood grain runs vertically along the sides and front, while the top surface displays a matching wood pattern with a slightly recessed border. The cabinet appears to have three vertical panels on each visible side, suggesting the presence of drawers, though no seams or hardware are visible. The finish is matte, with a subtle texture that highlights the natural wood grain. Its robust build and understated style make it suitable for use in offices, archives, or other organized urban environments.
description: A tall, rectangular wooden filing cabinet with a minimalist, handle-less design and a rich brown wood grain finish. The cabinet has a matte surface and subtle vertical paneling.
description_view_0: The front view shows a flat wooden surface with three vertical panels and no visible handles or hardware.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the same vertical paneling and wood grain, maintaining the minimalist look.
description_view_2: The rear view is nearly identical to the front, with consistent wood grain and paneling.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the other side, with matching vertical panels and wood texture.
